summary: This topic outlines the steps required to process monthly salaries for employees after their paydays have been accurately set in the system.
steps: Select the desired 'Month' and 'Year' for which you want to process salaries.
A list of all employees will appear. You can use the search function to find a single employee if needed.
Select the employee(s) for whom you wish to process salary by ticking the checkbox.
business_rules: Employee paydays must be set for the respective month before their salaries can be processed.
important_notes: The 'Process Salary' action creates the salary record in the system; it does not initiate the actual payment disbursement.
After successful processing, the system will display 'Added' next to the employee's record, indicating their salary has been created.
questions: How do I process salaries for all employees for a specific month?
What are the prerequisites for processing employee salaries?
Where can I confirm if an employee's salary has been successfully processed?
Can I process salary for a single employee instead of all?
